hard_stops.logic: subcontractor is active on site without verified workers compensation coverage — statutory WC is required for every sub with no exceptions
subcontractor has an expired certificate of insurance and is currently active on site
GC is not named as additional insured on subcontractor's general liability policy — required before sub mobilizes
project does not have a verified builder's risk policy in place — required before construction begins

soft_flags.logic: subcontractor EMR exceeds maximum threshold of 1.25 — elevated risk
certificate of insurance expiring within 30 days — renewal needed
subcontractor coverage limits are below project minimum requirements but policy is not expired
contract requires waiver of subrogation endorsement but it is not verified on the COI
subcontractor performing hazmat or environmental remediation scope without pollution liability coverage
design-build subcontractor or engineer without professional liability coverage
